$description: Newroz (Kurdish New Year) theme stub — only tokens that change from default. Swaps orange brand to green/red/white Kurdish flag palette. Viewport glow becomes multi-color festive.

primary.$description: Newroz green — Kurdish flag green, replaces Bobby orange

shadow.$description: Multi-color Newroz glow — green (primary), red (fire), gold (sun)

_notes.status_colors: Status colors (success/error/warning) remain unchanged — they are functional, not brand.
_notes.how_to_activate: Copy this file as the active theme, rebuild tokens. Components never change.
additional_ideas: Add Newroz fire animation to viewport glow
Swap app greeting to 'نەورۆزتان پیرۆز بێ'
Consider red/gold secondary accents for CTAs
